{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Prince Rellask's wand
| introduced = The Pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Prince Rellask]] uses a wand made of gold-plated bone.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c7">''The Pilot'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
